channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (short_term)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: Ariana Grande @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-06-10 03:00 → 2026-06-11 03:00 — Ariana Grande at Oakland Arena. Ariana Grande's tour is highly anticipated and showcases her strong live reputation.

item.title: Shakira @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-06-20 02:30 → 2026-06-21 02:30 — Shakira at SAP Center at San Jose. Shakira's world tour is generating significant buzz, particularly with themes of empowerment.

item.title: James Blake @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-06-12 02:00 — James Blake at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. James Blake's tour is expected to deliver an intimate and powerful live experience.

item.title: Bob Dylan @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-06-14 02:00 → 2026-06-15 01:30 — Bob Dylan at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Bob Dylan's legendary status and live reputation make his shows a must-see.

item.title: Pitbull @ Shoreline Amphitheatre
item.description: 2026-06-08 03:00 — Pitbull at Shoreline Amphitheatre. Pitbull's energetic performances and special guest Lil Jon promise a lively show.

item.title: The Pussycat Dolls @ Shoreline Amphitheatre
item.description: 2026-06-13 01:30 — The Pussycat Dolls at Shoreline Amphitheatre. The Pussycat Dolls' reunion tour is generating excitement among fans of early 2000s pop.

item.title: Madison Beer @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-06-24 02:30 — Madison Beer at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. Madison Beer's tour is gaining traction, appealing to a younger audience with her pop sound.

item.title: Toadies @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-06-13 03:00 — Toadies at The Fillmore. Toadies' tour brings a nostalgic alt-rock vibe, appealing to fans of the genre.

item.title: The Lemon Twigs @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-06-18 03:00 — The Lemon Twigs at The Fillmore. The Lemon Twigs are known for their engaging live performances and unique sound.

item.title: Belle & Sebastian @ The Masonic
item.description: 2026-06-11 03:00 → 2026-06-12 03:00 — Belle & Sebastian at The Masonic. Belle & Sebastian's shows are beloved for their charm and engaging storytelling.

item.title: Metric @ The Masonic
item.description: 2026-06-22 02:00 → 2026-06-23 02:00 — Metric at The Masonic. The lineup of Metric, Broken Social Scene, and Stars promises a memorable night for indie fans.

item.title: Ringo Starr and His All Starr Band @ San Jose Civic
item.description: 2026-06-12 03:00 — Ringo Starr and His All Starr Band at San Jose Civic. Ringo Starr's legacy and the All Starr Band's lineup make this a noteworthy event.

item.title: Jane Remover @ The Regency Ballroom
item.description: 2026-06-16 03:00 → 2026-06-17 03:00 — Jane Remover at The Regency Ballroom. Jane Remover's live exhibit promises an innovative and engaging performance experience.
